qualityBar.principle: Fixture staging bar: every composition must name a structural idea that stays powerful when dressed in any committed visual identity and survives the wireframe test for deterministic seed testing.

families.label: Fixture Stagings
families.description: Fixture staging family with one entry per mode for seed mode-filter testing.

families.label: Fixture Stagings B
families.description: Second fixture family so the catalog meets family minimums during validation.

families.label: Fixture Stagings C
families.description: Third fixture family so the catalog meets family minimums during validation.

families.label: Fixture Stagings D
families.description: Fourth fixture family so the catalog meets family minimums during validation.

compositions.form: a fixture surface staged as ranked plates case 1, where one live register receives whichever plate the visitor promotes and rank stays legible throughout
compositions.lineage: Fixture staging lineage of ranked plate choreography
grammar: Staging/hierarchy: one working field owns the page and ranked plates order everything else for case 1
Sequence/attention: attention walks the ranked plates in order and lands on the single live register for case 1
Controls/state: selecting a plate promotes it to the live register while the rest hold their rank for case 1
Adaptation: narrow screens stack the plates into one column and selection alone advances the sequence for case 1
compositions.spark: You promote the third plate and the live register accepts it with the whole rank sliding one notch to make room, case 1 holding steady.
compositions.webLeverage: View transitions between plate ranks with a keyboard-promotable live register
